articles.title: 伊朗战事实时更新：官员称12名美军在沙特基地遇袭受伤
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: 12 U.S. Troops Injured in Attack on Saudi Base, Officials Say
articles.summary: 美国官员透露，沙特阿拉伯苏尔坦亲王空军基地遭遇袭击，事件造成12名美军士兵受伤，其中2人伤势严重。这是自2月28日伊朗战事爆发以来，美军防御遭遇的最严重突破事件之一。
articles.summary_original: Two of the Americans were seriously wounded in the strike on the Prince Sultan Air Base, the officials said, in one of the most serious breaches of American defenses since the war began on Feb. 28.

articles.title: 北京航空航天大学举行树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育专题辅导报告会 - 北航新闻网
articles.summary: 北京航空航天大学举行树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育专题辅导报告会，深入学习习近平总书记相关重要论述。目前新华网、光明网、中国日报网、人民网等多家主流权威媒体，纷纷刊出相关内容，解读相关重要论述，引导树立践行正确政绩观。

articles.title: 让西藏人民生活更加幸福美好 - 求是
articles.summary: 求是推出题为《让西藏人民生活更加幸福美好》的报道，聚焦西藏发展建设与民生福祉改善，围绕如何更好满足西藏人民对美好生活的需求展开相关论述，目前公众可前往Google新闻平台查看这篇报道的完整内容。

articles.title: 9点1氪｜“华人神探”李昌钰去世；罗技为“一降价你像狗一样跑来”广告语道歉；寿司郎就餐需出示手机SIM卡尾号
articles.summary: 近期多个热点事件引发关注：“华人神探”、美籍华裔刑事鉴识专家李昌钰逝世，享年87岁；罗技因发布侮辱消费者的广告语致歉，已下架内容并处理相关人员；寿司郎多地门店为防黄牛要求就餐出示SIM卡尾号，引发热议，科技领域也有多项新动态公布。

articles.title: 老虎伍兹撞车后被控酒驾
articles.title_original: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
articles.summary: 近日，知名高尔夫运动员泰格·伍兹在美国佛罗里达州发生一起车祸，其所驾驶的车辆在这起事故中发生侧翻。事故发生后，泰格·伍兹被指控酒后驾驶，目前正面临该项法律指控。
articles.summary_original: Tiger Woods is facing charges of driving under the influence after rolling his car in a crash in Florida.

articles.title: 曹操出行2025年业绩：首次调整后Q4盈利，迈向盈利性增长新阶段
articles.summary: 3月27日，曹操出行公布2025全年业绩，业务覆盖全国195座城市，全年营收202亿元同比增长38%，经调整后第四季度首次实现单季盈利，已具备自我造血能力，依托定制车模式跑赢行业，同时全链条布局Robotaxi，2026年将加速商业化推进。

articles.title: “这是将来雄安产业发展的基本底气” - 共产党新闻网
articles.summary: 共产党新闻网推出一篇聚焦雄安新区产业发展的报道，报道以“这是将来雄安产业发展的基本底气”为题，围绕雄安产业发展的核心支撑与发展根基展开相关阐述，该报道的完整内容可在Google新闻平台查看。

articles.title: 业绩快报 | 茶百道2025年业绩报：新品业绩贡献超30%，部分门店咖啡日售超百杯
articles.summary: 3月27日茶百道发布2025年业绩，全年总GMV达161.8亿元，同比增长11%，单店日均GMV较上年提升10%。公司坚持不依赖外卖补贴，靠产品力与高效供应链实现增长，新品对GMV贡献超30%，下沉市场门店占比提升，计划2026年底咖啡业务覆盖2000家门店。

articles.title: 德里附近新建十亿美元机场 将考验印度建设热潮
articles.title_original: New $1 Billion Airport Near Delhi to Test India’s Buildout Boom
articles.summary: 印度新德里附近原本平淡无奇的农业城镇朱瓦尔，目前因一个造价十亿美元的新建机场项目掀起大规模建设热潮，当地房地产从业者对此欣喜不已，该项目将对印度当前的建设扩张热潮形成检验。
articles.summary_original: Realtors in Jewar are ecstatic. A construction frenzy sparked by an airport project has swept through this otherwise monotonous farming town near New Delhi.

articles.title: 出行因战争受阻 国际音乐节扎根亚洲
articles.title_original: Music Festivals Put Down Roots in Asia as War Makes Travel Tough
articles.summary: 受战争影响，全球出行遭受严重冲击，出行的不确定性大幅提升，乐迷长途跋涉参与音乐节的意愿发生明显改变。多家全球性音乐节顺势调整布局，逐步贴近亚洲受众，纷纷在亚洲落地扎根。
articles.summary_original: Global music festivals are moving closer to their audiences in Asia as war-driven travel disruptions reshape how far fans are willing to go.

articles.title: 据报道物理智能公司再次洽谈融资10亿美元
articles.title_original: Physical Intelligence is reportedly in talks to raise $1 billion, again
articles.summary: 据报道，物理智能公司正推进新一轮大额融资，此轮融资目标规模为10亿美元。若交易顺利完成，该公司估值将在短短四个月内，在当前56亿美元的基础上实现翻倍。
articles.summary_original: The deal would effectively double the company's $5.6 billion valuation in just four months.

articles.title: 莫桑比克前财政部长出行遇变故后遭美国移民海关执法局羁押
articles.title_original: Ex-Mozambique Finance Minister in ICE Custody After Travel Snafu
articles.summary: 莫桑比克一名前财政部长因参与涉案金额20亿美元的债券欺诈案在美国被定罪。其律师表示，该前财长刑满释放后原定于周四被驱逐出境，却因出行出状况被美国移民与海关执法局羁押。
articles.summary_original: A former Mozambique finance minister convicted in the US for his role in a $2 billion bond fraud was set to be deported Thursday after his release from prison, but was instead detained by Immigration and Customs Enforcement, according to his lawyer.

articles.title: 以军证实空袭伊朗两座核设施 - 新华网
articles.summary: 以军证实其空袭了伊朗两座核设施，分别为布什尔核电站与阿拉克重水反应堆。伊朗称此次袭击是以美所为，伊朗方面表示，遇袭后运行中的布什尔核电站反应堆未受损，无辐射泄漏，目前状态正常，俄罗斯对该核电站遇袭表达了极其愤慨的态度。

articles.title: 机器人格斗、脑机接口 4大主题展区带你开启“科幻之旅” - 华龙网
articles.summary: 2026中国科幻大会打造多元融合科技盛会，大会设置四大主题展区，涵盖机器人格斗、脑机接口、机器人乐队等科幻感十足的内容，可带领参观者开启科幻之旅。北京市副市长靳伟透露，当前北京全市科幻产业规模超600亿元，多家媒体对本次大会进行了探访报道。

articles.title: 华尔街一周 | 伊朗战事中的中国角色、全球肥料供应中断、抹茶供应问题
articles.title_original: Wall Street Week | China’s Role in Iran War, Global Fertilizer Disruptions, Matcha’s Supply Problem
articles.summary: 彭博社本期《华尔街一周》聚焦多项经济热点：美联储本周维持利率不变，预计伊朗战事将推高全球肥料、燃料价格，带来更多不确定性与涨价；同时还探讨了首次购房者动用退休储蓄购房、社交媒体带火农产品需求的机遇与风险。
articles.summary_original: This week, the Fed holds rates steady, anticipating greater uncertainty and higher prices as war in Iran drives up fertilizer and fuel costs. Plus, letting first-time homebuyers tap retirement savings might ease down payments, but it can also fuel demand and push home prices higher. Later, can farmers respond quickly enough when social media spikes demand for their produce, or do viral trends create more risk than opportunity? (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 坚决拥护党中央对郭永航涉嫌严重违纪违法进行纪律审查和监察调查的决定 - epaper.nfnews.com
articles.summary: 党中央决定对涉嫌严重违纪违法的郭永航开展纪律审查和监察调查。郭永航现任广东省政协党组成员、副主席，曾任广州市委书记，曾长期在深圳工作，也有珠海任职经历，还曾担任马兴瑞秘书，此番被查或与其珠海任职期间的问题有关。

articles.title: 收盘：2026年3月27日
articles.title_original: The Close 3/27/2026
articles.summary: 彭博电视台推出聚焦华尔街收盘钟声前后时段的最新新闻与分析节目，本期为2026年3月27日播出内容，邀请了摩根士丹利、洛杉矶市长、伯恩斯坦研究、花旗等多家机构及政界共八位嘉宾参与，内容来源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley’s Jim Caron, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass, Bernstein Research’s Stacy Rasgon, TWG Global Managing Partner Amos Hochstein, Envestnet’s Dana D’Auria, Bokeh Capital Partners’ Kim Forrest, Citi’s Michael Anderson, Evercore ISI’s Sarah Bianchi. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 联合国秘书长针对霍尔木兹海峡局势成立专门工作组 - 京报网
articles.summary: 针对霍尔木兹海峡局势，联合国秘书长正式成立处理相关事务的专门工作组。该消息由京报网发布，目前事件的完整报道可在Google新闻平台查看，这一专门工作组的设立，将为协调处理霍尔木兹海峡相关事务提供支撑。

articles.title: 持有Anthropic股权的基金上市后行情反转大幅下挫
articles.title_original: Fund With Anthropic Stake Slides in Post-Listing Reversal
articles.summary: Fundrise创新基金股价周五连续第二个交易日大幅下跌，不过当前股价仍远高于其持仓标的的实际价值，该基金持有有望启动IPO的SpaceX与Anthropic等多家私营科技企业的股权。
articles.summary_original: Shares of the Fundrise Innovation Fund fell sharply for a second straight day Friday, though remain well above the underlying value of its holdings in private tech firms including the potentially IPO-bound SpaceX and Anthropic PBC.

articles.title: 女演员称找出隐秘网络施暴者：竟是自己丈夫
articles.title_original: Actress Says She’s Found Her Secret Online Abuser: Her Husband
articles.summary: 德国女演员科琳·费尔南德斯指控丈夫就是对自己实施网络侵害的幕后黑手，称对方发布了她的深度伪造内容。该事件引发德国公众愤怒、抗议活动，还触发议会辩论，目前丈夫对相关指控予以否认。
articles.summary_original: Collien Fernandes said her spouse had posted deepfakes of her. The account, disputed by her husband, spurred outrage, protests and parliamentary debates in Germany.

articles.title: 米莱任期后阿根廷发售1.5亿美元债券 定价反映风险
articles.title_original: Argentina’s $150 Million Bond Sale Prices Risk After Milei’s Term
articles.summary: 周五，阿根廷完成一笔总额1.5亿美元的美元计价债券发售。此次发债旨在测试在总统哈维尔·米莱首个任期结束后，投资者为阿根廷政府提供融资的意愿，相关风险也通过此次发债定价得到体现。
articles.summary_original: Argentina sold $150 million of a bond denominated in dollars on Friday that gauged investors appetite to finance the government beyond President Javier Milei’s first term.

articles.title: 因供应短缺索尼临时暂停存储卡销售
articles.title_original: Sony temporarily suspends memory card sales due to shortages
articles.summary: 索尼宣布自2026年3月27日起，将停止接受旗下几乎全系列CFexpress与SD存储卡的订单，此次暂停销售源于供应短缺，受影响产品涵盖CFexpress Type A、Type B及SDXC/SDHC卡，仅少数Type B型号和低端SF-UZ系列暂不受影响。
articles.summary_original: Sony has announced that as of March 27th, 2026, the company is no longer accepting orders for nearly all the products in its CFexpress and SD memory card lines. The list of affected memory products includes CFexpress Type A, Type B, and SDXC/SDHC cards, although a few models of Type B and low-end SF-UZ series […]

articles.title: 特朗普再次呼吁全面开放霍尔木兹海峡
articles.title_original: Trump Repeats Call to Fully Open Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: 特朗普在美国迈阿密发表讲话称，目前美国与伊朗的谈判正在进行，美方希望能够与伊朗达成相关协议，同时明确要求霍尔木兹海峡必须全面开放，这一消息来源于彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Speaking in Miami, President Donald Trump says he hopes a deal can be reached with Iran and talks are ongoing, but the Strait of Hormuz has to be fully repoened. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 洛杉矶市长：本市面临的首要问题是民生可负担性
articles.title_original: LA Mayor: Number One Issue Facing City Is Affordability
articles.summary: 洛杉矶市长凯伦·巴斯做客彭博社《收盘》节目，谈及当前本市油价与失业状况，透露了留住本地影视产业的计划，介绍了与凯西·瓦瑟曼合作筹备2028年奥运会的安排，她认为落地加州的世界杯将拉动城市经济增长。
articles.summary_original: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass discusses the current state of gas prices and unemployment and plans to keep the filming industry in the city. She also discusses working with Casey Wasserman for the 2028 olympics, and as the World Cup comes to California the mayor sees it as an economic boom. She speaks with David Gura and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 男子因图谋燃烧弹袭击亲巴勒斯坦活动人士纽约住所被捕
articles.title_original: Man arrested over plot to firebomb pro-Palestinian activist's NY home
articles.summary: 据法庭文件披露，一名预谋使用燃烧弹袭击亲巴勒斯坦活动人士纽约住所的男子已被逮捕，执法人员在对相关地点开展搜查后，在该男子位于霍博肯的住处一共查获了八枚自制燃烧弹。
articles.summary_original: Agents found eight Molotov cocktails in the man's Hoboken home, according to court documents.

articles.title: 泰格·伍兹在佛罗里达发生翻车车祸
articles.title_original: Tiger Woods in Rollover Car Crash in Florida
articles.summary: 据彭博社消息，泰格·伍兹周五在美国佛罗里达发生车祸，其驾驶的路虎撞上另一辆车后翻车，伍兹因涉嫌酒后驾车在事故现场被警方逮捕。马丁县警长办公室表示，伍兹在本次事故中并未受伤。
articles.summary_original: Tiger Woods was arrested on suspicion of DUI Friday at the scene of a car crash in which he struck another vehicle and rolled his Land Rover, authorities said. The Martin County Sheriff’s Office said Woods was not injured. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 软银400亿美元新增贷款缘何指向OpenAI 2026年IPO
articles.title_original: Why SoftBank’s new $40B loan points to a 2026 OpenAI IPO
articles.summary: 华尔街巨头摩根大通与高盛正为日本企业集团软银提供一笔为期12个月的无抵押贷款，这笔总额达400亿美元的新增贷款，被市场解读指向人工智能企业OpenAI计划于2026年完成首次公开募股。
articles.summary_original: Wall Street giants JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs are extending a 12-month, unsecured loan to the Japanese conglomerate.

articles.title: 卢比奥称美国预计将在未来数周内结束伊朗战事
articles.title_original: Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'
articles.summary: 美国政客卢比奥称，美国预计将在未来几周内结束伊朗战事。他同时表示，美国盟友愿意协助在霍尔木兹海峡执行护航任务，目前该海峡已被伊朗封锁，伊朗还威胁要向过往海峡的船只收取通行费。
articles.summary_original: Marco Rubio said US allies were open to helping escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for.

articles.title: 影石上一代Link 2C 4K网络摄像头直降20% 表现出众
articles.title_original: Insta360’s last-gen Link 2C is fantastic 4K webcam now that it’s 20 percent off
articles.summary: 对于频繁进行视频展示或线上聊天的用户来说，出色的网络摄像头能带来显著体验提升。目前影石上一代Link 2C 4K网络摄像头在亚马逊、百思买等多渠道降价，降幅20%直降30美元，售价119.99美元，适合需要升级设备的消费者。
articles.summary_original: If you spend a lot of time presenting or chatting over video, you know how big a difference a decent webcam can make. Thankfully, if you’re looking to level up your setup at home or at work, the last-gen Insta360 Link 2C is currently available for $119.99 ($30 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and B&H […]

articles.title: 白宫推出新官方应用 特朗普要求民众通过该应用向ICE举报人员
articles.title_original: The White House has an app now, and Trump wants you to report people to ICE on it
articles.summary: 近日，白宫推出适配安卓与iOS系统的全新官方应用，该应用仅将白宫官网内容迁移为应用格式。周五官方发布推文宣传这款应用，附带一段调侃导弹发射的视频，视频中出现的是苹果手机，而非外界传闻的特朗普专属手机。
articles.summary_original: A new official White House app on Android and iOS takes the content from the White House website and copies it into app format. A tweet announcing the app on Friday morning appeared alongside a video joking about missile launches that also appears to feature an iPhone, rather than the elusive Trump Phone. There's no […]

articles.title: 等等，特朗普手机或真的存在
articles.title_original: Wait, the Trump phone might actually exist
articles.summary: 外界一直关注传言中特朗普手机的下落，相关追踪者每周都会跟进询问其动向。追踪者近日称，已找到这款手机的美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）认证记录，确认它已获得认证，具备在美国市场推出的资质。
articles.summary_original: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week I think I've found an FCC listing for the phone, showing it's received certification to launch in the US. Last week I issued a reminder that Trump Mobile's […]

articles.title: 联合国报告记录叙利亚宗派暴力 已致超1700人死亡
articles.title_original: U.N. Report Documents Sectarian Violence in Syria That Killed Over 1,700
articles.summary: 联合国发布报告记录了造成超1700人死亡的叙利亚宗派暴力事件，调查人员指出，2025年7月该国发生针对德鲁兹平民的法外杀戮与酷刑，总统艾哈迈德·沙拉领导的叙利亚政府几乎未就此采取应对措施。
articles.summary_original: Investigators said the government of President Ahmed al-Sharaa had done little to address the extrajudicial killings and torture of Druse civilians in July 2025.

articles.title: 国会陷入僵局机场乱象持续 特朗普下令向运输安全管理局工作人员发薪
articles.title_original: Trump orders paycheques for TSA workers as Congress stalls and airport chaos grinds on
articles.summary: 美国国会陷入僵局，政府部分停摆已持续40天，机场安检拥堵乱象持续发酵。特朗普下令向美国运输安全管理局工作人员发放薪资，此前的夜间投票已朝着结束此次停摆、缓解机场安检长队问题迈出一步。
articles.summary_original: The late-night vote was a step towards bringing the 40-day partial shutdown - and long security lines at US airports - to an end.

articles.title: 伊朗支持的黑客入侵FBI局长卡什·帕特尔个人邮箱
articles.title_original: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
articles.summary: 受伊朗支持的黑客入侵美国联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔的个人邮箱后，黑客组织公开了据称属于帕特尔的简历与照片信息。美国联邦调查局方面表示，此次流出的信息均为历史性质内容。
articles.summary_original: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".

articles.title: 内存芯片巨头SK海力士或通过美国重磅IPO助力终结“内存末日”
articles.title_original: Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO
articles.summary: 内存芯片巨头SK海力士计划赴美国进行IPO，此次上市预计可募资100亿至140亿美元，所筹资金将用于扩大产能。该公司的扩产举动有望带动行业其他厂商跟进，帮助终结当前全球内存芯片短缺的“内存末日”危机。
articles.summary_original: SK hynix’s potential U.S. listing could raise $10-$14 billion to help it build more capacity, encourage others to follow, and end the 'RAMmageddon' memory shortage.

articles.title: 一图看Waymo载客量飙升
articles.title_original: Waymo’s skyrocketing ridership in one chart
articles.summary: 全球知名自动驾驶企业Waymo的付费自动驾驶出租车业务增长迅猛，数据显示，其每周完成的付费载客出行订单量，在不到两年时间内已经实现十倍增长，整体业务规模迎来大幅扩张。
articles.summary_original: Waymo's weekly paid robotaxi trips have increased tenfold in less than two years.

articles.title: 数据中心、人工智能与能源领域最新动态
articles.title_original: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
articles.summary: 大规模新型数据中心是科技企业发展人工智能的物理基础，当前全球掀起数据中心扩容热潮，这类承载高能耗服务器的设施，因会对电网、居民电费、周边社区及环境造成负面影响，已在世界各地引发诸多争议。
articles.summary_original: Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment.  From audacious plans to launch data centers into […]

articles.title: 安克160W Prime充电器可同时为三台设备供电，直降50美元
articles.title_original: Anker’s 160W Prime Charger can power three devices at once, and it’s $50 off
articles.summary: 安克推出新款160W Prime充电器，单台可替代多个充电器，能同时为三台设备供电，可减轻频繁往返居家、外出办公用户的负重。该充电器原价149.99美元，目前输入指定优惠码，在亚马逊与安克官网仅售99.99美元，直降50美元。
articles.summary_original: If you’re constantly switching between working at home and on the go, Anker’s latest 160W Prime Charger can lighten your load by replacing multiple chargers with a single device. It’s normally $149.99, but right now you can buy it at both Amazon and Anker’s online storefront (with coupon code WS24MNV8G7) for $99.99 thanks to Amazon’s […]

articles.title: 两艘赴古巴援助船离开墨西哥后失踪
articles.title_original: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
articles.summary: 古巴受美国禁运影响，长期面临食品与燃料短缺问题。两艘满载援助物资、前往古巴的船只，在离开墨西哥后失踪，目前墨西哥海军已出动，针对两艘失踪船只展开救援行动。
articles.summary_original: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

articles.title: 诺埃莉亚·卡斯蒂略·拉莫斯赢得安乐死权利后于西班牙离世
articles.title_original: Noelia Castillo Ramos Dies in Spain After Winning Right to End Her Life
articles.summary: 25岁的诺埃莉亚·卡斯蒂略·拉莫斯长期遭受慢性身心疼痛折磨，自2024年起便申请协助结束生命，但其父亲提起诉讼试图阻止该请求。诺埃莉亚在赢得结束自身生命的权利后，已于西班牙离世。
articles.summary_original: Noelia Castillo Ramos, 25, who was in chronic physical and psychological pain, had sought an assisted death since 2024, but her father sued to prevent it.

articles.title: 黑客声称数据泄露后 欧盟委员会确认遭遇网络攻击
articles.title_original: European Commission confirms cyberattack after hackers claim data breach
articles.summary: 欧盟委员会作为欧盟的最高执行机构，近期有媒体报道称黑客从该机构的云存储系统中窃取了大量数据，在黑客对外宣称发生数据泄露后，欧盟委员会正式确认了此次网络攻击事件属实。
articles.summary_original: The European Union's top executive body has confirmed a cyberattack after hackers reportedly stole reams of data from the European Commission's cloud storage.

articles.title: 经博索纳罗家族推动 美国或将巴西帮派列为恐怖组织
articles.title_original: U.S. May Label Brazilian Gangs as Terror Groups, After Push by the Bolsonaros
articles.summary: 入狱的巴西前总统雅伊尔·博索纳罗的儿子们向美国政府游说推动后，美国特朗普政府正考量将巴西境内最大的两个贩毒帮派正式定性为恐怖组织，相关事项目前仍处于评估权衡阶段。
articles.summary_original: The Trump administration is weighing declaring Brazil’s two largest drug gangs terrorist groups, after lobbying by the sons of jailed former President Jair Bolsonaro.

articles.title: 奥地利成为最新提议禁止儿童使用社交媒体的国家
articles.title_original: Austria becomes latest to propose social media ban for children
articles.summary: 奥地利日前提出相关提案，拟禁止14岁以下儿童使用社交媒体。法国、西班牙等多个欧洲国家此前已经出台了类似的限制未成年人使用社交媒体的措施，奥地利成为最新跟进推出这类儿童社交媒体禁令提案的欧洲国家。
articles.summary_original: The proposed under-14 ban follows similar steps in other European countries, including France and Spain.

articles.title: 据报道Aetherflux开展B轮融资 估值达20亿美元
articles.title_original: Aetherflux reportedly raising Series B at $2 billion valuation
articles.summary: 据市场消息，Aetherflux正推进B轮融资，本轮交易估值达20亿美元，该轮融资由风投机构Index Ventures领投，预计整体融资规模在2.5亿美元至3.5亿美元之间。
articles.summary_original: Index Ventures is said to be leading a $250 million to $350 million round.

articles.title: 夏威夷直升机坠毁致三人死亡
articles.title_original: Three dead after helicopter crash in Hawaii
articles.summary: 当地官员通报，夏威夷近日发生一起直升机坠毁事故，涉事直升机共载有1名飞行员和4名乘客，坠毁地点位于一处海滩外约100码处，这起事故目前已造成三人死亡。
articles.summary_original: The helicopter, which was carrying one pilot and four passengers,crash-landed about 100 yards off a beach, officials say.

articles.title: Nuki一触式改装智能锁迎来首次折扣
articles.title_original: Nuki’s one-touch retrofit smart lock got its first-ever discount
articles.summary: Nuki智能锁是目前适配既有死锁的优质改装智能锁，主打极简设计、功能齐全。当前亚马逊春季大促期间，它售价149美元，为该产品有史以来最低价，解锁速度快，支持Matter-over-Thread协议，智能家居兼容性出色。
articles.summary_original: The Nuki Smart Lock is the best retrofit smart lock currently available for people who want a minimalist, feature-packed upgrade to their preexisting deadlock. It’s currently selling for $149 at Amazon — its cheapest price ever — during the Big Spring Sale. Its fast unlocking speed, Matter-over-Thread support, and broad smart home compatibility impressed my […]

articles.title: Rivian获大众汽车追加10亿美元投资
articles.title_original: Rivian gets another $1B from Volkswagen
articles.summary: 电动企业Rivian获得大众汽车追加的10亿美元投资。目前双方正推进合资项目合作，该合资项目计划将Rivian的电动汽车技术应用到大众汽车旗下电动车型中，助力双方电动化布局推进。
articles.summary_original: The two companies have been collaborating on a joint venture that would see Rivian tech go in VW's EVs.

articles.title: 伊朗黑客声称入侵FBI局长卡什·帕特尔个人电子邮箱账户
articles.title_original: Iranian hackers claim breach of FBI director Kash Patel’s personal email account
articles.summary: 据称效力于伊朗政府的亲伊朗黑客组织汉德拉，对外公布了一批邮件内容。该组织声称，这批内容是从美国联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔的个人Gmail电子邮箱中窃取所得，此前该组织已声称成功入侵帕特尔的这一个人账户。
articles.summary_original: Handala, a pro-Iranian hacking group allegedly working for Iran’s government, published emails it said were taken from the Gmail account of FBI director Kash Patel.

articles.title: 这款模块化创作机可定制衬衫、手机壳及模具
articles.title_original: This modular crafting machine can create custom shirts, phone cases, and molds
articles.summary: 以激光切割雕刻工具闻名的创作工具厂商xTool，推出了全新多功能创作机WonderPress。它并非一体式创作设备，可承接Cricut、热升华打印机等其他设备输出的设计，制作各类定制文创产品。
articles.summary_original: xTool, a company best known amongst makers for its laser-based cutting and engraving tools, has announced a new multi-function crafting machine called the WonderPress. It's not an all-in-one device that can help you get an Etsy store off the ground, but the WonderPress can help turn designs from other machines, like Cricuts or sublimation printers, […]

articles.title: 我们精选春季大促50美元以下24款最优优惠
articles.title_original: We handpicked the 24 best Big Spring Sale deals under $50
articles.summary: 向来春季鲜有大型折扣活动，亚马逊却热衷于打造全季度优惠活动，目前该平台正举办春季大促，活动将持续至美国东部时间4月1日凌晨2点59分，百思买、沃尔玛、新蛋等多家零售商也已加入本次促销活动。
articles.summary_original: Despite the fact that spring isn’t often associated with big discounts, Amazon seems keen to turn every season into one filled with savings. Case in point? The retailer is currently hosting a spring sales event, which will run through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. Retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Newegg have also hopped aboard […]

articles.title: 摩托罗拉Razr Ultra 2026或较上一代略厚
articles.title_original: Motorola’s Razr Ultra 2026 might be a hair thicker than last year’s version
articles.summary: 近年来多数旗舰手机都在不断向更轻薄方向升级，即将推出的摩托罗拉Razr Ultra 2026却或将比前代更厚。XpertPick与OnLeaks于周四曝光了该机的尺寸数据，显示其厚度相比2025款会有小幅增加。
articles.summary_original: While most flagship phones have been steadily getting slimmer over recent years, the upcoming 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra could end up being a bit chunkier than its predecessor. Leaked measurements of the phone shared by XpertPick and OnLeaks on Thursday show that it will be slightly thicker than the 2025 version, about […]

articles.title: 苹果称使用锁定模式的用户未遭间谍软件攻击
articles.title_original: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware
articles.summary: 近期发生了针对运行旧版软件苹果设备的黑客工具泄露事件，在此背景下，全球科技巨头苹果公司对外表示，截至目前，尚未发现任何启用锁定模式的苹果设备遭到间谍软件的成功攻击。
articles.summary_original: The tech giant's claim that it has not seen any successful spyware attacks targeting Apple devices with Lockdown Mode enabled comes amid a leak of hacking tools targeting users running devices with older software.

articles.title: OpenAI关停Sora Meta法院败诉
articles.title_original: OpenAI shuts down Sora while Meta gets shut out in court
articles.summary: 肯塔基州一名82岁女性拒绝了人工智能公司2600万美元的土地收购邀约，对方拟在此修建AI数据中心。尽管该公司仍试图重新规划附近2000英亩土地用途，随着AI基础设施向现实世界扩张，现实世界已开始出现抵制，这类张力随处可见。
articles.summary_original: When an 82-year-old Kentucky woman was offered $26 million from an AI company that wanted to build a data center on her land, she said no. Sure, that same company can try to rezone 2,000 acres nearby anyway, but as AI infrastructure stretches further into the real world, the real world is starting to push back.  That tension is everywhere […]

articles.title: 携手共迎挑战 开放共塑未来——博鳌亚洲论坛2026年年会凝聚同心共进力量 - 中国日报网
articles.summary: 博鳌亚洲论坛2026年年会召开，中国日报网、人民网、中国经济网、中华网等多家主流媒体发布相关报道。本次年会凝聚开放合作、同心共进的广泛共识，倡导携手开创亚洲和世界美好未来，与会专家呼吁加强地区合作应对关税战带来的全球贸易挑战。

articles.title: 批评人士称接受安乐死离世的西班牙女子遭国家失职
articles.title_original: Spanish woman who died through euthanasia failed by state, say critics
articles.summary: 西班牙女子诺埃利亚·卡斯蒂略，在与亲生父亲展开一场旷日持久的法律纠纷后，于本周四晚间在巴塞罗那一家医院接受安乐死离世，批评人士认为这一悲剧的发生属于国家失职。
articles.summary_original: Noelia Castillo died on Thursday evening in a Barcelona hospital, after a protracted legal battle with her own father.

articles.title: 龙湖：2025年收入973.1亿，预计两年后完成新模式筑基
articles.summary: 3月27日龙湖集团发布2025年度业绩报告，全年营收约973.1亿元，运营及服务业务收入占比达27.5%创历史新高，龙湖已安全度过偿债高峰，财务状况稳健。管理层预计最晚2028年运营及服务收入将超地产开发业务，完成新发展模式筑基。

articles.title: 氪星晚报｜菜鸟集团与泰国正大集团旗下CP AXTRA签署战略合作协议；平头哥镇岳510出货量超50万片，多家存储公司SSD已搭载该芯片；猎户星空推出AI Agent服务机器人
articles.summary: 本次汇总多条科技商业领域最新资讯：菜鸟集团与泰国正大集团旗下CP AXTRA签署战略合作，将共同打造东盟即时零售物流网络；平头哥镇岳510 SSD主控芯片累计出货超50万片；万达电影拟更名儒意电影，小鹏汽车将更名为小鹏集团，猎户星空推出AI Agent服务机器人。

articles.title: 欧洲人对特朗普愤怒，却往往宽容美国人
articles.title_original: Europeans Are Angry at Trump, but Often Forgiving of Americans
articles.summary: 一代人之前，外界对美国入侵伊拉克的愤怒情绪常常演变为泛化的整体反美情绪。如今不少欧洲人已能够清晰做出区分，他们对特朗普心怀愤怒，却不会将这种情绪迁怒于普通美国民众，对后者往往持宽容谅解的态度。
articles.summary_original: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.

articles.title: 阿联酋与卡塔尔因伊朗袭击相关网络视频逮捕数百人
articles.title_original: UAE and Qatar Arrest Hundreds Over Online Videos of Iranian Attacks
articles.summary: 阿联酋与卡塔尔当局展开一轮逮捕行动，以存在安全风险为由阻止民众发布伊朗袭击的相关视频。除官方给出的安全理由外，专家分析，两国此举还因担心这类内容损害自身“安全避风港”的国家形象。
articles.summary_original: The authorities have made a wave of arrests to stop people posting footage of strikes, citing security risks. Experts also see a fear of damage to the countries’ image as safe havens.

articles.title: 中共中央政治局召开会议审议《中国共产党地方委员会工作条例》 中共中央总书记习近平主持会议 - 凤凰网
articles.summary: 中共中央政治局召开会议，中共中央总书记习近平主持会议，会议审议《中国共产党地方委员会工作条例》。此次会议引发多家境内外媒体关注，凤凰网等对会议进行报道，部分境外媒体围绕会议内容作出了相关解读。
